–1. A title of an Assyrian officer
  .SeeRAB-SHAKEH (RABSHAKEH)
  .SeeTARTAN
  .Sent by Sennacherib against Jerusalem2Ki 18:17
–2. An Assyrian prince during the time of Nebuchadnezzar, or, 
possibly, a second name given to Nebushazban (also spelled NEBO-SARSEKIM or SARSEKIM, 
N. I. V.)Jer 39:3,13
